name: openroot-os
description: OpenRoot OS Release 6 - Developer Experience production release for openroot.tech.

scripts.build: npm run validate:all && npm run generate:public-content && vite build --config apps/renanberto/vite.config.ts
scripts.lint: echo "No lint configured for OS Release 6"
scripts.format: echo "No formatter configured for OS Release 6"
scripts.validate:all: npm run validate && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:architecture && npm run validate:features && npm run validate:consistency && npm run typecheck
scripts.rc:check: npm run validate:all && npm run build && npm run validate:pages && npm run audit:static
